name: @flying-pillow/mission-adapters
description: Mission universal pilot interface for Copilot, Aider, Claude Code, and transport wrappers

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @flying-pillow/mission-core build && rm -rf build && rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --dir ../.. exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --project adapters
